changeSet.author: crm
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${schema}.audit_log ( id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), entity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, entity_id UUID NOT NULL, action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, actor_id UUID, actor_name VARCHAR(200), changes JSONB, comment VARCHAR(2000), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
CONSTRAINT audit_log_pk PRIMARY KEY (id) );

changeSet.author: crm
crm
